scripts.build: npm --workspace @dnd/types run build && npm --workspace @dnd/env run build && npm --workspace @dnd/ui run build && npm --workspace @dnd/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @dnd/types run typecheck && npm --workspace @dnd/env run typecheck && npm --workspace @dnd/ui run typecheck && npm --workspace @dnd/web run typecheck
